title: Emperor's Shadow (shuttle)

The '''''Emperor's Shadow''''' was the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] private [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and personal [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]].

==Description==
The ''Emperor's Shadow'' was the private [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|209|Droga, Jeng}}</ref> and personal [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] believed the ''Shadow'' was equipped with a full [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] and considered it untraceable.<ref name="From the Files of Corellia Antilles" /> The yacht was rumored to be as big as the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].<ref name="The Kaal Connection" />

==History==
[[File:JengDroga.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Jeng Droga was the captain of the ''Emperor's Shadow'']]
During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the ''Emperor's Shadow'' was guarded by the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Jeng Droga]], who shared a psychic connection with Palpatine.<ref name="The Emperor's Pawns">{{GamerCite|5|The Emperor's Pawns}}</ref>

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] Droga [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the ''Shadow'' to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]] in the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]], where he was to await his master's instructions.<ref name="The Kaal Connection" /> When the Emperor [[Death/Legends|died]] his first [[Death/Legends|death]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="rotj">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Droga felt his master's death through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. At that moment, aboard the ''Emperor's Shadow'', Droga's body wrenched in pain, and he began screaming.<ref name="The Kaal Connection" /> He then fell into a state of insanity,<ref name="The Emperor's Pawns" /> crushing the windpipe of one of his crew members before taking his dual lightsabers to the rest of his subordinates. In his rampage, he smashed the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] controls of the ''Emperor's Shadow'',<ref name="The Kaal Connection" /> causing the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to plummet into one of the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of Kaal. Palpatine's spirit, which had survived Endor, journeyed all the way to Kaal and entered Droga's body. Now infused with Palpatine's tremendous dark energy, Droga was driven to madness. In time, [[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] was able to extract Palpatine's essence from Droga's body, allowing the Emperor to inhabit one of his clone bodies.<ref name="The Emperor's Pawns" />

[[File:KarrdeasHart.png|thumb|left|Talon Karrde, posing as Syndic Pandis Hart, heard the rumor that the ''Emperor's Shadow'' had crash-landed on Kaal]]
In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], [[Talon Karrde]] heard a rumor that the ''Emperor's Shadow'', had crash-landed on Kaal. The rumor also said that the ship was equipped with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]]. Karrde and his associate, [[Quelev Tapper]], traveled to Kaal to investigate; while Karrde posed as [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] Pandis Hart, chief purchasing agent of the [[Sif-Uwana Council]], Tapper purchased a [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] craft from a local [[Unidentified dealer|dealer]] and began searching for the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] near the [[Unis Islands]]. Tapper had located the likely vessel submerged near the Unis Islands and relayed its location to Karrde. Meanwhile the negotiations with the ruler of Kaal, [[Tirgee Benyalle]], for the Sif-Uwana Council to be allowed to conduct its own harvesting operation in a specific area fell apart, and Karrde communicated with Tapper, and told him to rig the ship to blow. Tapper complied, setting charges throughout the wreck.<ref name="The Kaal Connection" /> It was unconfirmed whether the vessel destroyed by Tapper was the ''Emperor's Shadow'', nor there was any confirmation that a cloaking device was installed aboard.<ref name="From the Files of Corellia Antilles" />

Following the [[Thrawn campaign]], the ''Emperor's Shadow'' was believed to have possessed an advanced cloaking shield and thus attracted the attention of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], who intended to examine the technology. The [[Galactic Museum Artifact Recovery Office]] was willing to fund an undercover expedition to Kaal in order to retrieve the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]].<ref name="From the Files of Corellia Antilles" />
